name: biltema-product-lookup
description: Adapter for Biltema's public typeahead API: single-article lookup, full-text search, and random-product sampling. Useful for retail/inventory apps that resell or reference Biltema items.

endpoints: GET /api/biltema/random?count=20 — random sample across categories (auth required, optional)

externalServices.name: Biltema typeahead
externalServices.rateLimit: unofficial — no published limits; use Next.js revalidate cache (300s on search, 3600s on lookup)

postInstall: 1. The lookup endpoint is public by default (intended for typeahead in line-item forms) — add an auth check if you don't want this
2. The Biltema API is unofficial — Biltema may block, change, or rate-limit at any time; treat results as best-effort
3. If you don't need the random endpoint, drop api/random.ts — it issues 4 parallel uncached requests per call
